title: Doña Francisquita
writer: José Luis Colina, Guillermo Fernández Shaw, Federico Romero
actors: Mirtha Legrand, Armando Calvo, Antonio Casal
plot: Francisquita, owner of a pastry shop with her widowed mother, loves Fernando, but he only has eyes for Aurora, a temperamental artist. It's his father who courts Francisquita, despite her efforts to interest the son. Aided by Fern...
